evals.prompt: I'm trying to upload my Flutter app IPA to Transporter and I got this error: 'ERROR ITMS-90396: Missing BGTaskSchedulerPermittedIdentifiers. The Info.plist in the Runner.app bundle contains the processing value for the UIBackgroundModes key, but no BGTaskSchedulerPermittedIdentifiers were found.' My app doesn't use background tasks at all — I never call BGTaskScheduler anywhere. What should I fix and how?
evals.expected_output: Clear explanation that 'processing' should be removed from UIBackgroundModes in Info.plist since the app doesn't use BGTaskScheduler. Includes the exact XML to remove and optionally a grep command to confirm no BGTaskScheduler usage exists in the codebase.
assertions: Identifies removing 'processing' from UIBackgroundModes as the fix
Explains WHY removing it is correct (app doesn't use BGTaskScheduler)
Shows the exact XML line to remove or edit in Info.plist
Does NOT suggest adding BGTaskSchedulerPermittedIdentifiers as the fix (that would be wrong for an app that doesn't use it)

evals.prompt: I submitted my Flutter app to App Store Connect but Transporter showed two yellow warnings: (1) 'Missing entitlement: push-to-talk' and (2) 'Missing purpose string: NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescription'. My app does use location (I have NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription) but has no push-to-talk feature. What do I need to change in Info.plist to fix both warnings before I resubmit?
evals.expected_output: Two clear fixes: (1) remove push-to-talk from UIBackgroundModes, (2) add NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescription key with a non-empty description string. Should explain that having 'location' in UIBackgroundModes requires both location keys.
assertions: Fix 1: instructs removing push-to-talk from UIBackgroundModes
Fix 2: instructs adding NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescription with a non-empty string
Explains that 'location' in UIBackgroundModes requires BOTH location description keys
Mentions that warnings (yellow) still allow delivery but cause App Review rejection

evals.prompt: I just created a new app listing in App Store Connect for my Flutter app under my personal Apple account (team ID WGN6W58YD3). My Firebase project has the iOS app registered with the old bundle ID from a previous team and the wrong App Store ID. What Firebase settings do I need to update to align with the new Apple app listing?
evals.expected_output: Actionable checklist: update App Store ID in Firebase iOS app settings, confirm Team ID matches, verify BUNDLE_ID in GoogleService-Info.plist, optionally re-download GoogleService-Info.plist. Should also mention App Check and Analytics as optional improvements.
assertions: Mentions updating the App Store ID in Firebase Project Settings
Mentions verifying or updating the Team ID in Firebase
Mentions checking BUNDLE_ID in GoogleService-Info.plist matches the new bundle ID
